privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires interacting with the AttendHRM application. The target employee is Rajesh Kumar (EMP-1001). Record 1 must show Company: 'Tata Consultancy Services', Designation: 'Senior Software Engineer', From year: 2018, To year: 2022. Record 2 must show Company: 'Infosys Limited', Designation: 'Software Engineer', From year: 2015, To year: 2018.
